description: Phase 32: QuantOS - Operating System Layer Package. Create packages/quantos/ with app launcher, window management, notification center, file system abstraction, widget system, workspaces, clipboard sync, and device integration APIs.
steps: Create packages/quantos/package.json with deps (@quant/common, @quant/realtime, @quant/storage, zod) and tsconfig.json extending root
Create packages/quantos/src/types.ts - Type definitions for Window, Workspace, Widget, Notification, FileSystemNode, ClipboardItem, DeviceCapability, AppInstance, LaunchConfig
Create packages/quantos/src/core/app-launcher.ts - AppLauncher class: launchApp, listInstalledApps, installApp, uninstallApp, getAppState, focusApp, minimizeApp, switchApp
Create packages/quantos/src/core/window-manager.ts - WindowManager class: createWindow, closeWindow, moveWindow, resizeWindow, tileWindows, maximizeWindow, minimizeWindow, getWindowStack, focusWindow

Create packages/quantos/src/core/notification-center.ts - NotificationCenter class: pushNotification, dismissNotification, getNotifications, markAsRead, setDoNotDisturb, groupNotifications, getUnreadCount
Create packages/quantos/src/core/file-system.ts - FileSystemAbstraction class: readFile, writeFile, deleteFile, listDirectory, moveFile, copyFile, searchFiles, getFileMetadata, watchFile
Create packages/quantos/src/core/widget-system.ts - WidgetSystem class: registerWidget, unregisterWidget, layoutWidgets, updateWidget, getWidgetData, configureWidget
Create packages/quantos/src/core/workspace-manager.ts - WorkspaceManager class: createWorkspace, switchWorkspace, deleteWorkspace, listWorkspaces, moveWindowToWorkspace, getActiveWorkspace
Create packages/quantos/src/core/clipboard-sync.ts - ClipboardSync class: copy, paste, getHistory, clearHistory, syncClipboard, setMaxHistorySize
Create packages/quantos/src/core/device-integration.ts - DeviceIntegration class: getCapabilities, requestPermission, accessCamera, accessMicrophone, getLocation, getBiometrics, listContacts
Create packages/quantos/src/index.ts barrel export for all modules
Create packages/quantos/src/__tests__/window-manager.test.ts - Tests for window CRUD, tiling, focus management
Create packages/quantos/src/__tests__/notification-center.test.ts - Tests for notification lifecycle, DND mode, grouping
Create packages/quantos/src/__tests__/app-launcher.test.ts - Tests for app launch, install, focus switching
acceptance_criteria: packages/quantos/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
All 8 core classes are implemented with full TypeScript types
NotificationCenter handles push/dismiss/read with DND mode
FileSystemAbstraction provides a unified file API
ClipboardSync supports cross-device clipboard with history
DeviceIntegration provides permission-gated access to hardware APIs
Unit tests pass for window manager, notification center, and app launcher
pnpm typecheck passes for the package
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run packages/quantos/src/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
